title: The Pale of Settlement: Jewish Life in Eastern Europe
title_zh: 犹太人定居区：东欧犹太生活史
title_he: תחום המושב: חיי היהודים במזרח אירופה

cultural_parallels.description: Comparison between the Pale's residential restrictions and China's household registration system

header_image_prompt: A Chinese brushstroke landscape in traditional shan shui (山水) style depicting a vast, cold Eastern European plain with simple wooden villages scattered across rolling hills. In the foreground, a small shtetl with modest houses and a wooden synagogue sits beneath a grey winter sky. Ink wash technique in muted earth tones—charcoal greys, sepia browns, and touches of pale blue—creating a contemplative, melancholic mood.
